utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 fields. Check if fully specified: destination provided; travel_dates provided; transportation includes type, flight details, and cost—meets requirement; accommodation includes name and cost—meets requirement; activities listed with names and costs—meets requirement; additional_services provided (None)—acceptable; total_budget provided as a single figure but not a detailed breakdown (no summation of sub-items or taxes/fees), yet it matches sum of listed costs (€100+€220+€35+€40+€20=€415, whereas total shows €395, indicating inconsistency and not a proper breakdown). Therefore, total_budget is not fully specified as a complete cost breakdown and also inconsistent. All other 6 items are fully specified.
